reason: Shipping damage — 3 pcs cosmetic damage to flanged end
notes: Customer reported damage on delivery. Inspected and reworked.
inspectionNotes: Verified: surface scoring on 3 units. Repolished and returned.

reason: Dimensional non-conformance — fin spacing 0.005" over tolerance on 5 pcs
notes: Customer returned 5 pcs. Root cause: tool wear. Replaced free of charge.
inspectionNotes: Confirmed OOT on 5 units. Scrapped and replaced at no charge.

reason: Surface porosity on 2 units — unacceptable for pneumatic application
notes: Blue Ridge returned 2 manifolds. Material batch issue. Replaced FOC.
inspectionNotes: Confirmed porosity. Determined to be raw material defect in that batch. Replaced from next material lot.
